title: Israeli Strikes Escalate in South Lebanon Amid Evacuation Warnings
summary: Israeli forces expanded evacuation warnings to a 'red zone' covering over 20 towns in southern Lebanon and launched intensive strikes, killing 42 people in 24 hours.
contents:
## Israeli Strikes Escalate in South Lebanon Amid Evacuation Warnings

### Overview
Israeli forces expanded evacuation warnings to a 'red zone' covering over 20 towns in southern Lebanon and launched intensive strikes, killing 42 people in 24 hours.

### Details
The Israeli army issued successive evacuation orders extending 22 kilometers from the border into Tyre and Nabatieh areas, prompting displacement toward Sidon.[1] Strikes targeted multiple towns, including a drone attack on a motorcycle in al-Shahabiyeh that killed two and wounded one, plus raids in Al Hamza neighborhood and Zebdine that killed nine including children and women.[1] Rescue teams recovered bodies in Jouaya and faced challenges at a collapsed house in al-Hinniyeh, raising total casualties since March 2 to 2,576 dead and 7,962 wounded.[1]

### Geographic context
Location: South Lebanon.
